chain.thought: Explanation: The list of finishers includes Rolf Stommelen, who is German and finished 6th. No other German drivers finished ahead of him, making him the first German to finish.

judge_thought: Explanation: The only German driver listed is Rolf Stommelen (Surtees-Ford), who finished 6th. All drivers finishing ahead of him (Jackie Stewart, Ronnie Peterson, Jacky Ickx, Denny Hulme, Emerson Fittipaldi) are not German. Therefore, Stommelen is the first German to finish.
